name: langgraph-docs
description: Use this skill for requests related to LangGraph in order to fetch relevant documentation to provide accurate, up-to-date guidance.
capabilities: Fetches the official LangGraph documentation index from docs.langchain.com
Selects 2-4 most relevant documentation URLs based on user questions
Retrieves specific documentation pages including how-to guides and tutorials
Provides accurate, up-to-date guidance using official documentation sources
author: langchain-ai
securitySummary: This is a pure prompt-based documentation lookup skill with no executable code. All detected findings are false positives: hash algorithm names appear only in metadata fields (not actual crypto operations), C2 keywords like 'fetch' are legitimate documentation retrieval operations, and hardcoded URLs point to official LangChain documentation sources.
valueStatement: Finding accurate LangGraph documentation requires navigating multiple pages and filtering through extensive content. This skill automatically fetches the documentation index, identifies the most relevant guides for your question, and retrieves the specific content you need.
limitations: Does not execute code or run examples
Only accesses official LangChain documentation, not third-party resources
Cannot answer questions outside the scope of LangGraph documentation

useCases.title: Implementation Guidance
useCases.description: Get step-by-step instructions for building agent workflows with LangGraph

useCases.title: API Reference Lookup
useCases.description: Find detailed API documentation and parameter specifications quickly

useCases.title: Conceptual Understanding
useCases.description: Learn core LangGraph concepts through official tutorials and guides

promptTemplates.title: Basic API Question
promptTemplates.prompt: How do I use the StateGraph class in LangGraph to create a workflow?

promptTemplates.title: Implementation Guide
promptTemplates.prompt: What are the steps to implement human-in-the-loop approval in a LangGraph agent?

promptTemplates.title: Architecture Question
promptTemplates.prompt: Explain how checkpointing works in LangGraph and when to use it

promptTemplates.title: Troubleshooting
promptTemplates.prompt: My LangGraph agent is getting stuck in a loop. What patterns can prevent this?

bestPractices: Ask specific questions about features or APIs to get the most relevant documentation
Include context about your use case for better results (agent type, integration requirements)
Use this skill before writing code to verify implementation patterns against official docs
antiPatterns: Asking general questions about AI concepts unrelated to LangGraph
Expecting code execution or debugging of your local environment
Relying solely on this skill without reviewing the full documentation for complex implementations

faq.question: Which AI tools support this skill?
faq.answer: This skill works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code. Check your tool's documentation for installation.

faq.question: What documentation sources are accessed?
faq.answer: Only official LangChain documentation at docs.langchain.com is accessed. No third-party resources.

faq.question: How many documentation pages are retrieved?
faq.answer: The skill fetches the documentation index first, then selects 2-4 of the most relevant pages.

faq.question: Is my data sent to external servers?
faq.answer: Only your question is sent to docs.langchain.com to retrieve documentation. No personal data is transmitted.

faq.question: Why are some answers incomplete?
faq.answer: The skill retrieves documentation but does not execute code. Complex implementations may require full docs review.

faq.question: How does this differ from web search?
faq.answer: This skill accesses the official documentation index directly, ensuring accurate information from the source.
